ValidationRule.description: The Finance Date is not allowed by Finance.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =true, $User.IsFinanceManager__c = false, FinanceDate__c < ProjectCostCenter__r.FinanceDateLimit__c, OR( ISPICKVAL(InvoiceStatus__c,"Draft"), ISPICKVAL(InvoiceStatus__c,"Approval"), ISPICKVAL(InvoiceStatus__c,"Ready") ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: This finance date is not allowed. Please get in touch with Finance. (IN017)
